    R

    registrationDeadline - Variable in class com.example.codebase.CreateEventViewModel
    Registration deadline as a yyyy-MM-dd string.
    registrationOpen - Variable in class com.example.codebase.CreateEventViewModel
    Date on which registration opens, as a yyyy-MM-dd string.
    respondToInvitation(Event, String, boolean) - Method in class com.example.codebase.Invitations
    Processes an entrant's response to an event invitation.
    ROLE_ADMIN - Static variable in class com.example.codebase.WelcomeActivity
    Role constant for an administrator.
    ROLE_USER - Static variable in class com.example.codebase.WelcomeActivity
    Role constant for a standard entrant / end-user.
    RoleCheckActivity - Class in com.example.codebase
    Invisible entry point activity, registered as MAIN/LAUNCHER.
    RoleCheckActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.RoleCheckActivity
